mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.cheliang_order_uuid_number as cheliangOrderUuidNumber ,a.cheliang_id as cheliangId ,a.yonghu_id as yonghuId ,a.shangjia_id as shangjiaId ,a.cheliang_order_price as cheliangOrderPrice ,a.cheliang_order_status_types as cheliangOrderStatusTypes ,a.insert_time as insertTime ,a.pay_time as payTime ,a.finish_time as finishTime ,a.cancel_reason as cancelReason ,a.create_time as createTime
